description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, octagonal base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with a single broad, light gray reflective stripe encircling its midsection, featuring a honeycomb pattern for enhanced visibility. The surface of the cone shows signs of wear, including scuffs, scratches, and areas where the orange color has faded or chipped, indicating frequent outdoor use. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base is thick, black, and appears to be made of a heavier material, likely rubber, to prevent tipping and provide durability. No logos or text markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with a wide black base and a single gray reflective stripe, showing visible scuffs and outdoor wear.
description_view_0: The cone's front shows the reflective stripe and significant scuff marks, with the base's octagonal shape clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side highlights more surface scratches and a slightly different pattern of wear on the orange cone, with the reflective stripe still prominent.
description_view_2: The cone appears less worn on this side, with the reflective stripe and base both clearly visible and fewer scuff marks.
description_view_3: This view shows a relatively clean section of the cone, with the reflective stripe and base visible, and minimal surface damage.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, light gray reflective stripe encircles the cone's midsection, approximately one-fifth the height of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, thick, and black, likely made of heavy rubber for stability, with a slightly raised edge and visible wear.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: Worn, with visible scuffs, scratches, and faded areas, indicating frequent outdoor use.
